themes.reasoning_notes: Two-mana mana dork; taps for {G}, or {G}{G} with ferocious, making it a strong creature-based ramp piece.
Ferocious mode jumps from 1 to 2 mana, helping power out larger threats once a 4+ power creature is online.
Two-mana mana dork that taps for {G}, with ferocious upgrading to {G}{G}; this is a clear, efficient creature-ramp piece.
The ferocious mode increases output and helps cast larger spells, but it is still mainly a ramp creature rather than a dedicated big-mana payoff card.
